ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "id_in_session" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the participant in the session */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the participant */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for participant (could be NA) */,
  "_is_bot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is a bot */,
  "_index_in_pages" INTEGER /* Index of the participant's current page in the session */,
  "_max_page_index" INTEGER /* Maximum index of pages in the session */,
  "_current_app_name" TEXT /* Name of the current application being used */,
  "_round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the current session */,
  "_current_page_name" TEXT /* Name of the current page */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the participant */,
  "time_started" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "visited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has visited the session */,
  "mturk_worker_id" TEXT /* MTurk worker ID (if applicable) */,
  "mturk_assignment_id" TEXT /* MTurk assignment ID (if applicable) */,
  "payoff" REAL /* Payoff amount for the participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has given consent */,
  "survey_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has completed the survey */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the participation session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_in_session"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "id_in_group" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant's group */,
  "qa1" INTEGER /* Response to question A1 */,
  "qa2" INTEGER /* Response to question A2 */,
  "qa3" INTEGER /* Response to question A3 */,
  "qb1a" TEXT /* Response to question B1a */,
  "qb1b" TEXT /* Response to question B1b */,
  "qb1c" TEXT /* Response to question B1c */,
  "qb2a" TEXT /* Response to question B2a */,
  "qb2c" TEXT /* Response to question B2c */,
  "qb2d" TEXT /* Response to question B2d */,
  "qb3a" TEXT /* Response to question B3a */,
  "qb3c" TEXT /* Response to question B3c */,
  "qb3e" TEXT /* Response to question B3e */,
  "qb3f" TEXT /* Response to question B3f */,
  "subsession_id" INTEGER /* Subsession identifier */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group identifier */,
  "payoff" REAL /* Payoff amount for the player */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the participants table */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the surveys table */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the questions table */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was submitted */,
  "response_accuracy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is accurate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_in_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("id_in_session")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "id_in_subsession" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the group in a subsession */,
  "subsession_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the subsession */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the subsession */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the surveys table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_in_subsession"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_subsession_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsession_id") REFERENCES players ("subsession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the session */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the session */,
  "experimenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimenter conducting the session */,
  "mturk_HITId" TEXT /* MTurk HIT ID associated with the session */,
  "mturk_HITGroupId" TEXT /* MTurk HIT Group ID */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments related to the session */,
  "is_demo" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is a demo */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the surveys table */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the surveys table */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
